name: Shinhan Inverse NaturalGasFutures ETN(H)
summary: Shinhan Inverse NaturalGasFutures ETN(H) is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) offered by Shinhan Investment Corporation that provides inverse exposure to natural gas futures. The "(H)" likely indicates that it is currency hedged, aiming to minimize the impact of fluctuations in the exchange rate between the Korean Won and the currency in which the natural gas futures are denominated (typically USD).
